---
title: "ASE Data Pipeline & Streamlit Usage"
format: html
---

::: {.callout-note title="Source anchors"}
- App shell: [`NbvStreamlitApp`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/app.py#L79), [`PipelineController`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/controller.py#L34)
- App panels: [`render_data_page`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/panels/data.py#L148), [`render_candidates_page`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/panels/candidates.py#L121), [`render_depth_page`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/panels/depth.py#L15), [`render_rri_page`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/panels/rri.py#L15), [`render_vin_diagnostics_page`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/panels/vin_diagnostics.py#L50)
- Data contracts: [`AseEfmDatasetConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L33), [`AseEfmDataset`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L320), [`EfmSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L479), [`load_or_process_mesh`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/mesh_cache.py#L132)
- Rendering surface: [`CandidateViewGeneratorConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pose_generation/candidate_generation.py#L50), [`CandidateDepthRendererConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/candidate_depth_renderer.py#L77), [`Pytorch3DDepthRendererConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/pytorch3d_depth_renderer.py#L27)
:::

# Quickstart (Streamlit UI)

```bash
cd aria_nbv
nbv-st

# or launch the module file directly through Streamlit
streamlit run aria_nbv/streamlit_app.py
```

Pages in the app:

- **Data**: load one `EfmSnippetView` from ASE/ATEK (GT mesh optional).
- **Candidate Poses**: sample NBV candidates with collision / free-space rules.
- **Candidate Renders**: render depth for valid candidates via PyTorch3D.
- **RRI**: compute oracle RRI scores and compare point-cloud distances.
- **VIN Diagnostics**: run VIN `forward_with_debug` on oracle batches and inspect internal tensors.
- **Offline Stats**: summarize offline cache distributions; VIN snippet stats include per-point `inv_dist_std`/`obs_count` mean, std, and p95.
- **W&B Analysis**: compare multiple W&B runs in the project, including train/val dynamics and config-driven performance trends.
- **Optuna Sweeps**: inspect Optuna study results and visualize parameter effects across trials.
- **Testing & Attribution**: load checkpoints and compute VIN head attributions on cached samples.

The app caches configs + results in `st.session_state`. “Run previous” auto-runs earlier stages with cached settings, and the staged controller flow keeps reruns manageable without separate worker threads.

# Dataset loading (Data page)

Sidebar controls map to [`AseEfmDatasetConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L33), with page orchestration handled by [`NbvStreamlitApp`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/app.py#L79) and [`PipelineController`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/controller.py#L34):

- `scene_ids`: `[]` (auto-discover shards under `.data/ase_efm*`)
- `atek_variant`: `"efm"` (fixed)
- `load_meshes`: `True`, `require_mesh`: checkbox (default on)
- Mesh simplification: `mesh_simplify_ratio` slider (0 → no decimation)
- Mesh crop: `mesh_crop_margin_m` and `mesh_crop_min_keep_ratio`
- Verbosity/debug: `verbose=True`, `is_debug=True`

Buttons:

- **Run / refresh data**: loads first snippet (or cached index)
- **Next sample**: increments index then reloads
- **Clear cache**: drops all cached stages

# Candidate generation (Candidate Poses page)

Config fields surfaced from [`CandidateViewGeneratorConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pose_generation/candidate_generation.py#L50):

- `num_samples`, `min_radius`, `max_radius`, `min_elev_deg`, `max_elev_deg`
- `ensure_collision_free`, `min_distance_to_mesh`
- `ensure_free_space`
- `device` (`cpu`/`cuda`), `is_debug`

Plot controls:

- frustum scale, max frustums, option to plot only rejected poses
- frame orthonormality expander reporting `R^T R - I` and `det(R)` for the reference and sampling poses

Actions:

- **Run previous**: re-run Data stage with cached config
- **Run / refresh candidates**: rerun the candidate stage; results cached under `STATE_KEYS["candidates"]`

# Depth rendering (Candidate Renders page)

Config mirrors [`CandidateDepthRendererConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/candidate_depth_renderer.py#L77) and nested [`Pytorch3DDepthRendererConfig`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/pytorch3d_depth_renderer.py#L27):

- `max_candidates` (subset render), renderer `device`, `zfar`, `faces_per_pixel`, `is_debug`
- Checkbox: “Compute depth renders”

Actions:

- **Run previous**: ensures data + candidates exist
- **Run / refresh renders**: rerun the render stage; stores `CandidateDepthBatch`

# Logging & scratchpad

- Console logs collected via `Console.set_sink` into a textarea; clearable per page.
- “Interactive Python console” executes arbitrary code in the app process (uses `st`, `torch` pre-populated); output appended to logs.

# CLI: download datasets (unchanged)

```bash
# list top scenes by snippet count
python -m aria_nbv.data.downloader -m list -c efm -n 5

# download scenes (limit snippets to 10 each)
python -m aria_nbv.data.downloader -m download -c efm -n 5 --ms 10
```

# Programmatic dataset use

```python
from aria_nbv.data_handling.efm_dataset import AseEfmDatasetConfig

cfg = AseEfmDatasetConfig(atek_variant="efm", load_meshes=True, require_mesh=True)
ds = cfg.setup_target()
sample = next(iter(ds))  # EfmSnippetView
```

Typed views exposed on `sample`:

- `camera_rgb`, `camera_slam_left`, `camera_slam_right` → images + `CameraTW`
- `trajectory` → `PoseTW` series (`t_world_rig`)
- `semidense` → padded SLAM points + stds + bounds
- `gt` → OBBs / efm_gt
- `mesh` / `has_mesh`

# Pipeline recap (in-app)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    A[Dataset cfg<br/>ASE/ATEK] --> B[Load snippet<br/>EfmSnippetView]
    B --> C[Sample NBV poses<br/>CandidateViewGenerator]
    C --> D[Render depth<br/>CandidateDepthRenderer]
    D --> E[Inspect depth grid<br/>& pick NBV]
```

# Mesh handling

- Meshes are loaded once per scene (cached if `cache_meshes=True`).
- Optional decimation via `mesh_simplify_ratio`; optional crop AABB (`crop_aabb_from_semidense` in UI).
